name: Polymesh
summary: The Polygon class represents a polygon object that has its corners at the given points.

constructors.name: Polymesh
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the Polymesh class

methods.name: CompareFingerprints
methods.signature: public static bool CompareFingerprints(string fingerprint1, string fingerprint2)

returns.doc: True if fingerprints match, false otherwise

methods.name: Convert
methods.signature: public static List<FacetedBrep> Convert(ref dotPolymesh_t input)
methods.summary: Converts a struct of polymeshes to a list of CopyFacetedBrep.

methods.name: ConvertInvalidInfoFromStruct
methods.signature: public static List<KeyValuePair<int, Polymesh.PolymeshHealthCheckEnum>> ConvertInvalidInfoFromStruct(ref dotPolymeshValidateInvalidInfo_t input)
methods.summary: Convert a struct of invalid info to a list of pairs of outer loop index and error code. Read indexes and error codes from the integer list.

params.name: input
params.doc: Invalid info passed from TS core

returns.doc: A list of pairs of outer loop index, error code

methods.name: ConvertToStruct
methods.signature: public static void ConvertToStruct(FacetedBrep brep, ref dotPolymesh_t output)
methods.summary: Converts a CopyFacetedBrep to struct dot polymesh.

methods.name: Fingerprint
methods.summary: Gets fingerprint information for input brep

returns.doc: Fingerprint of the brep in string format

methods.name: FromStruct
methods.summary: Converts a struct of polymesh to a CopyFacetedBrep.

methods.name: GetSolidBrep
methods.signature: public static bool GetSolidBrep(FacetedBrep inBrep, out FacetedBrep outBrep)

returns.doc: True if Brep can create a valid solid, false if outBrep is nonsolid

methods.name: ToStruct
methods.summary: Converts a CopyFacetedBrep to dotnet polymesh struct.

methods.name: Validate
methods.signature: public static bool Validate(FacetedBrep brep, Polymesh.PolymeshCheckerFlags checkCriteria, ref List<KeyValuePair<int, Polymesh.PolymeshHealthCheckEnum>> invalidInfo)
methods.summary: Converts a CopyFacetedBrep to a polymesh and validates.

params.name: brep
params.doc: The FacetedBrep to be converted and validated

params.name: checkCriteria
params.doc: The flags to indicate what to check

params.name: invalidInfo
params.doc: The problematic faces' indices and their failed reasons, (-1, PolymeshUndefined) is for unknown reason for uncertain face. No inner loops checked further if outer loop found error.

returns.doc: True if valid, false if error found

properties.name: Brep
properties.summary: Gets or sets the polymesh that forms the object geometry.
